gt_sql: SELECT T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Text = 'thank you user93!'
pred_sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM comments c
JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE TRIM(c.Text) = 'thank you user93!'
question: Name the user that commented 'thank you user93!'
